sections.title: If the player does not have a ghostspeak amulet or Morytania Legs 2+ equipped

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hmm, I wonder if there's something I could use to communicate with him.

sections.title: If the player has a ghostspeak amulet or Morytania legs 2+ equipped

lines.speaker: Raulyn
lines.text: Aaah! What are you doing down here!?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey, keep it down! I've come to slay the monsters down here.

lines.speaker: Raulyn
lines.text: Oh, that's ok then. These vile creatures do make an awful racket.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You should hear it upstairs! Those Aberrant Spectres are just the worst.

lines.speaker: Raulyn
lines.text: I'm Raulyn. Once servant to the great Viggora who built this place centuries ago.

lines.speaker: Raulyn
lines.text: This was, of course, before the building started to sink into the swamp...

lines.speaker: Raulyn
lines.text: Oh, and the darn Zamorakian mages. They didn't help matters. Always making a mess.

lines.speaker: Raulyn
lines.text: I've been here ever since. You're the first person I've spoken to in over 200 years.

lines.speaker: Raulyn
lines.text: Sometimes, but it's not all that bad. I hope you stop by more often!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hopefully! I should be going now, speak to you later.

sections.title: When attempting to kill monsters that aren't part of a player's slayer task
If the player does not have a ghostspeak amulet or Morytania legs 2+ equipped
If the player has a ghostspeak amulet or Morytania legs 2+ equipped

lines.speaker: Raulyn
lines.text: I don't think that's what you're meant to be slaying.
